LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THE BAY CLUBS COMPANY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. MATTER CALLED AT 9:00 A.M. AS STATED IN THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO ALLEGE ULTIMATE FACTS SHOWING HOW DEFENDANT BREACHED A DUTY OF CARE AND/OR HOW THE PROPERTY WAS MAINTAINED IN A DEFECTIVE/DANGEROUS CONDITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THE BAY CLUBS COMPANY, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. MATTER CALLED AT 9:00 A.M. AS STATED IN THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO ALLEGE ULTIMATE FACTS SHOWING HOW DEFENDANT ENGAGED IN DESPICABLE CONDUCT WITH A CONSCIOUS DISREGARD TO PLAINTIFF'S SAFETY. SEE CC 3294(C)(1). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-23-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JENNIFER J. CAPABIANCO, ESQ. of Selman Breitman LLP, Tel No. 415-979-0400 appearing for Defendant The Bay Clubs Company, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Matter called at 9:00 a.m. as stated in the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE BAY CLUBS COMPANY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. Plaintiff has leave to allege ultimate facts showing how defendant breached a duty of care and/or how the property was maintained in a defective/dangerous condition. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JENNIFER J. CAPABIANCO, ESQ. of Selman Breitman LLP, Tel No. 415-979-0400 appearing for Defendant The Bay Clubs Company, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Matter called at 9:00 a.m. as stated in the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE BAY CLUBS COMPANY, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted with 20 days leave to amend. Plaintiff has leave to allege ultimate facts showing how defendant engaged in despicable conduct with a conscious disregard to plaintiff's safety. See CC 3294(c)(1). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Continued To Feb-10-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
